title: AI Model Catalog capability summary
description: Per-capability rollup of models whose support was verified by a live catalog test (source tested_by_catalog, value true). Consumers must ignore fields they do not recognize.

generatedAt.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of the build that produced this file.

capabilities.description: Capability name (see docs/CAPABILITY-FLAGS.md) -> verified count and model ids.

count.description: Number of models with this capability verified.
